aiSummary: Crowds are filling the Canal Saint-Martin in Paris, as temperatures soar above 100 degrees Fahrenheit. Forty people drowned while swimming in other waterways....
imageAlt: To Escape the Heat, Parisians Jump into an Old Industrial Canal
